Discretionary read: BB-upper rejection short (20x, real fill 66.43 @ 06/08 22:10 UTC-5). Setup: stopping candle ABOVE the BB basis up near the upper band (BOLL 26,2: mid 66.91 / upper 68.06); two 'reverse hammers' (inverted-hammer/shooting-star, one green) printing the top; next bar GAPPED DOWN (lower open) with a solid body + long UPPER wick and ~no lower wick = sellers in control; entered on the open of that confirmation bar. Confluences: MACD bearish (DIF 0.04<DEA 0.17, hist -0.25), KDJ bearish (K40.25<D49.06, J22.62), order book 65% sell. Targets 64.5 then 62; structural stop = reclaim of upper band ~68.1 (inferred). Live at log: 66.14, +7.88% (20x).
